titleStmt.title: SII 41.254: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 254. (A.R. No. 472 of 1905.) Tiruvālaṅgāḍu, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the first prakārā of the Naṭarājaśvamin shrine in the Vaṭāranēśvara temple at Tiruvālaṅgāḍu.

p.hi: Vijayanagara Kampana Udaiyar, Ananda, Mārgaḻi, Purva 5, Sunday, Mūlam = 1374 A.D.

summary.p: The temple trustees gift of 200 kuḻi of land at Kāraippākkam as tirunāmattukāṇi to the temple by the trustees of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka śubhamastu svastiśrī . Āṉantasamvaṟtsarattu mārkaḻi mātam pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum Ātittavāramum peṟṟa mulattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu maṇaviṟkoṭṭattu paḻaiyaṉūrnāṭṭu paḻaiyaṉūr Āḷuṭaiya nāyaṉār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku śrīmaṉmahāmaṇṭaleśvara harirāya vibhāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyarkaṇṭaṉ muvārayarkaṇṭaṉ vīra śrīkampaṇa Uṭaiyārkku bratuirācciyam cellāniṉṟa Āṉanta samvaṟsarattu Uṭaiyār tiruvālaṅkāṭuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārum panmākecurarum Āticaṇṭecuraṉ Aruḷāl tirunāmattukāṇiyāṉa kāraippākkattil
Irunūṟu kuḻi viṭṭom Ikkoyil tāṉattom Aruḷāl Ikkoyil kaṇakku Uttaraṉpeṭu Uṭaiyāṉ karumpaṉ Ammaiappa veḷāṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 41.254 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
